microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, partner-ready model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a replicable validation framework across cloud infrastructure.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring deep partner and stakeholder coordination.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to **reduce planning cycle time by 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, demonstrating ROI of automation investments to leadership and partner teams.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and aligning technical capabilities to customer objectives.

Accelerated data retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search tool**, cutting lookup time by 83% and improving solution discovery across engineering teams.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort per region**, then built a roadmap to automate critical launch paths — demonstrating structured pre-sales-style analysis to drive stakeholder buy-in.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact initiatives with clear, data-backed ROI framing.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating across IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across a fast-moving cross-functional team.

Drove cross-org alignment to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual configuration overhead for field engineering and partner-facing teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a CRM process that improved partner and customer evaluation speed throughout the sales lifecycle.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to strengthen channel partner visibility.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and presenting data-driven recommendations that sharpened competitive positioning.
